# Olga Emma Elume — Strategic Communications Professional

## About
Olga Emma Elume is a Strategic Communications Professional with 6+ years of experience driving impactful campaigns, media relations, and advocacy across Africa. She is based in Buea, Cameroon and is open to remote positions, nationally and internationally.

## Contact
- Website: https://olgaemma.com
- Email: hello@olgaemma.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/olgaemma
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/olgaemma

## Services
- Strategic Communications: Communication audits, messaging frameworks, multi-channel campaign strategy
- Media Relations: Media outreach, press releases, press conferences, media training
- Content Strategy & Creation: Blog writing, social media content, newsletter copywriting, speechwriting
- Crisis Communications: Crisis plans, rapid response protocols, reputation recovery
- Advocacy & Campaigns: Advocacy strategy, policy briefs, community mobilization, coalition building
- Brand Strategy: Brand audits, positioning, voice guidelines, launch campaigns

## Case Studies
- Reach Out Cameroon: Led 30+ multi-channel campaigns, 35% engagement increase
- Paradigm Initiative: Research and conference presentations across Africa
- Rock Me Fabulous: 60% social media follower growth, crisis management protocols
- PsyEduc Global Cameroon: 45% engagement increase, press conference management
